name: USS Connolly (DE 306)
events: 25 Sep 1944 During 25/26 September USS Blackfin (Cdr. G.H. Laird, Jr., USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Charles R. Greer (Cdr. A. Jackson, Jr., USNR), USS Hemminger (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Bodler, USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR), USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USNR) and USS Sea Fox (Cdr. R.C. Klinker, USN). These exercises included night exercises.

28 Sep 1944 USS Tambor (T/Cdr. W.J. Germershausen, Jr., USN) and USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Tisdale (Lt.Cdr. J.S. Hatfield, USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).
USS Tambor remained out for night exercises with USS Le Hardy and USS Fleming (Lt. K.F. Burgess, Jr., USNR).

2 Oct 1944 USS Halibut (T/Cdr. I.J. Galantin, USN), USS Pogy (T/Lt.Cdr. P.G. Molteni, Jr., USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USNR), USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Manlove (Lt. E.P. Foster, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).

3 Oct 1944 USS Tuna (T/Cdr. E.F. Steffanides, Jr., USN), USS Pogy (T/Lt.Cdr. P.G. Molteni, Jr., USN), USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Allen (Lt. J.A. Rowe, USNR), USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Fleming (Lt. K.F. Burgess, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Widgeon (Lt. C.W. Engler, USN).

5 Oct 1944 During 5/6 October 1944, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) and USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Hemminger (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Bodler, USNR).
Later, USS Pintado (T/Cdr. B.A. Clarey, USN) and USS Charles R. Greer (Lt. A.G. Raht, USNR) also joined for exercises.

6 Oct 1944 USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) and USS Atule (T/Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Charles R. Greer (Lt. A.G. Raht, USNR) and USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR).

16 Oct 1944 During 16/17 October 1944, the submarines USS Skipjack (T/Cdr. R.S. Andrews, USN), USS Swordfish (T/Cdr. K.E. Montross, USN), USS Albacore (T/Lt.Cdr. H.R. Rimmer, USN), USS Peto (T/Cdr. R.H. Caldwell, Jr., USN), USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) all conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor. These included night exercises. Also participating in these exercises were the destroyer minelayer USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR) and the destroyer escorts USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Hemminger (Lt.Cdr. J.R. Bodler, USNR).

20 Oct 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) and USS Pipefish (T/Cdr. W.N. Deragon, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Ramsay (Lt. R.R. Pollard, Jr., USNR).

21 Oct 1944 From 21 to 23 October 1944, USS Archerfish (T/Cdr. J.F. Enright, USN), USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) and USS Sea Cat (T/Cdr. R.R. McGregor, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with an inbound convoy coming from San Diego. This convoy was made up of the escort carriers USS Makin Island (T/Capt. W.B. Whaley, Jr., USN), USS Lunga Point (T/Capt. G.A.T. Washburn, USN), USS Bismarck Sea (T/Capt. J.L. Pratt, USN) and USS Salamaua (T/Capt. J.I. Taylor, Jr., USN). They were escorted since departure from San Diego by the destroyer escort USS Tills (Lt.Cdr. J.L. Brooks, USNR). The escort had been reinforced by the destroyer escorts USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Bright (Lt.Cdr. W.A. McMahan, USNR) which had escorted the three submarines from Pearl Harbor to the rendezvous point with the incoming convoy.

10 Dec 1944 USS Blueback (Cdr. M.K. Clementson, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Whitman (Lt.Cdr. R.G. Coan, USNR), USS Wileman (Lt.Cdr. R.M. Tanner, Jr., USNR), USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR), USS Tautog (Cdr. T.S. Baskett, USN) and USS Puffer (Lt.Cdr. C.R. Dwyer, USN).
16 Dec 1944 USS Charr (Cdr. F.D. Boyle, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Connolly (Lt.Cdr. W.A. Collier, USNR) and USS Sicard (Lt. J.W. Botten, USN).
